channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Trump promised to keep spying agencies in check. Then he fired the watchdogs he appointed
item.description: President Donald Trump vowed to fight government abuse and introduce more transparency, a stance that might align him with a little-known agency charged with watching over the U.S.’s powerful spying programs.
item.dc:creator: Alex Pasternack, Fast Company

item.title: World's first 122.88TB SSD gets 'reviewed' with two very odd bedfellows: the controversial DeepSeek and Nvidia's Jetson Orin AI SBC
item.description: Solidigm’s 122.88TB DP-P5336 SSD got tested as part of an experiment with DeepSeek and Nvidia’s Jetson Orin Nano Super motherboard.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: Woman with incendiary devices arrested following vandalism at Tesla dealership in Colorado
item.description: Tesla has become a target of protest ever since its CEO, Elon Musk, became part of President Donald Trump’s inner circle with his downsizing effort resulting in thousands of federal workers being laid off or fired.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: US Intel Chief Raises Concerns Over UK's Demand for Apple Backdoor Access
item.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard expresses concerns about the British government's demand for backdoor access to Apple's cloud data, citing potential violation of Americans' rights and civil liberties.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Elizabeth Holmes fails to overturn her Theranos fraud conviction
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Elizabeth Holmes, the disgraced founder of Theranos, will remain in prison after losing a bid Monday to overturn her fraud conviction, with a federal appeals court saying she hadn’t proved there were legal missteps during her trial for defrauding investors with false claims of w
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Apple announces $500 billion investment in US amid tariff threats that could affect the iPhone
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Apple announced Monday that it plans to invest more than $500 billion in the United States over the next four years, including plans to hire 20,000 people and build a new server factory in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: MongoDB acquires Voyage AI to reduce hallucinations in AI applications
item.description: Database engine developer MongoDB has acquired Voyage AI in order to help enterprises reduce hallucinations in AI-powered applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Harrison Ford addresses AI fears
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brazil Supreme Court justice orders Rumble suspension nationwide for alleged non-compliance
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — A Brazilian Supreme Court justice on Friday ordered the suspension of video-sharing platform Rumble in the South American nation for allegedly refusing to comply with court orders.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sweden is investigating a damaged cable in the Baltic Sea
item.description: STOCKHOLM (AP) — Swedish authorities said on Friday they were investigating a damaged cable that was discovered in the Baltic Sea, the latest in a string of recent incidents of ruptured undersea cables that have heightened fears of Russian sabotage and spying in the region.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Apple drops encryption feature for UK users after government reportedly demanded backdoor access
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple said Friday it will stop offering an advanced data security option for British users after the government reportedly demanded that the company provide backdoor access for any data those users have stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
